claimText: University business processes using AI should have oversight, review, and verification of AI outputs in place to ensure reliability, consistency, and accuracy.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: While automating tasks using AI may improve operational efficiency for University Business processes, oversight and review of the use of AI and verification of its outputs for these University business processes should be in place to ensure reliability, consistency, and accuracy.

citation.citationTitle: Statement on Guidance for the University of Pennsylvania Community on Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence
